creator: archie@packetdesign.com
text:
Same problem happened with 4.2-REL on another machine, except it
was a different port and it didn't seem like there was any interrupt
conflict. Now I'm thinking it's just a bug in the driver.

At least one other person has seen the same problem:

http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/getmsg.cgi?fetch=777342+779066+/usr/local/www/db/text/2000/freebsd-questions/20000521.freebsd-questions

-Archie
